description: Control which users can see and operate which GPS devices through an ACL permission model, with hierarchical device groups that inherit configuration and enable bulk sharing, user restrictions to limit dangerous operations, and manager-level user provisioning.

actors.name: Administrator
actors.description: Has unrestricted access to all resources; can create users and assign devices

actors.name: Manager
actors.description: Can create subordinate users up to their user_limit and share devices with them

actors.name: Fleet User
actors.description: Has access only to explicitly shared devices and groups

fields.name: email
fields.description: User's email address; used for authentication and notifications

fields.name: name
fields.description: Full display name of the user

fields.name: administrator
fields.description: Grants unrestricted access to all platform resources

fields.name: readonly
fields.description: Prevents all write operations; user can only view data

fields.name: device_readonly
fields.description: Prevents modifications to device records while allowing full tracking access

fields.name: limit_commands
fields.description: Prevents the user from sending any commands to devices

fields.name: disable_reports
fields.description: Prevents the user from generating or downloading any reports

fields.name: device_limit
fields.description: Maximum number of devices this user account may have directly shared; -1 means unlimited

fields.name: user_limit
fields.description: Maximum number of subordinate users this user may create; 0 means user cannot create others

fields.name: expiration_time
fields.description: Date after which the user account is automatically disabled

fields.name: parent_group_id
fields.description: Parent group reference enabling nested group hierarchies

rules: Administrator users have implicit access to all resources; no explicit permission records are required
Regular users only see and interact with devices, geofences, drivers, and other resources that have been explicitly shared with them
Sharing a group with a user grants access to all devices currently in that group and any devices added to the group in the future
Group attributes are inherited by child groups and their devices; device-level attributes override inherited group values
A manager (user_limit > 0) can create subordinate users but cannot grant more permissions than they themselves have
The device_limit constrains how many devices can be shared with a given user account; administrators are exempt
Readonly users can view all accessible data but cannot modify any records, create events, or send commands
device_readonly users can track and monitor devices but cannot edit device configuration
limit_commands users can see device positions but cannot use the command interface
disable_reports users can track live positions but cannot generate historical reports or exports
An expired user account is treated as disabled; active sessions are invalidated

given: admin or manager shares a device with a user
user has not reached their device_limit
sharing user has access to the device themselves

then.description: Permission record linking user to device created

device_shared_with_user.result: User can now see the device in their fleet view and receive its events and alerts

given: admin or manager shares a device group with a user
sharing user has access to the group

then.description: Permission record linking user to group created

group_shared_with_user.result: User gains access to all current and future devices in the group

given: admin removes an explicit sharing permission
permission_revoked.result: User loses access to the resource; ongoing sessions lose visibility immediately

device_limit_exceeded.result: Sharing rejected; operator must increase the user's device_limit or remove an existing device

errors.message: This user has reached the maximum number of devices they may access
You cannot share resources you do not have access to
The specified user does not exist

events.name: device.shared
events.description: A device has been shared with a user

events.name: group.shared
events.description: A device group has been shared with a user

events.name: permission.revoked
events.description: A user's access to a resource has been removed

related.description: Devices must be registered before they can be shared
Command access is gated by the limit_commands user restriction
Report access is gated by the disable_reports user restriction
